text:
Created attachment 189340
weechat build log

The command you requested doesn't seem to work for this port

$:/usr/ports/irc/weechat$ make show-config output
make: don't know how to make show-config. Stop

make: stopped in /usr/ports/irc/weechat


Attached is the log result from running "sudo make install" from within the ports folder. Is there another file that shows the build config? Not too familiar with port structure yet. 

Instead I just ran portmaster with --force-config again and in the resulting curses screen, I have everything in the top section checked and in the Plugins section, I have the following checked: ASPELL, CHARSET, LUA, PERL, PYTHON
